item.title: Update: Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: Car now correctly marked as Super Pro ahead of Re-Volt World release

item.title: Update: Lamborghini Gallardo
item.description: New carbox, colors, shadow- updated parameters, regenerated hull, and PRM fixes

item.title: Update: Skyline H/T 2000GT-R
item.description: Removed backface culling from steering wheel texture

item.title: Update: Honda CR-X SiR
item.description: New carbox, colors, shadow- updated parameters, regenerated hull, and other tweaks

item.title: Update: Ford F-250 Lowrider
item.description: New carbox, colors, shadow- updated parameters, regenerated hull, and other tweaks

item.title: Update: Skyline H/T 2000GT-R
item.description: Updated carbox, new color method (colors may vary slightly from before)

item.title: Update: Ford Focus 1.8i
item.description: New color method (custom colors may vary slightly from before)

item.title: Update: Toyota bB
item.description: Updated carbox, new color method (colors may vary slightly from before)

item.title: Update: Skyline H/T 2000GT-R
item.description: New hull, paints, params, fixes, carbox- up to my current standards!

item.title: Update: Persona 5 Morgana Van
item.description: Mild parameter tweaks- slightly less stable?

item.title: Update: Toyota bB
item.description: Carbox added, parameter tweaks, new hull

item.title: Updates: Focus 1.8i and Oreca Viper
item.description: Improvements across the board- new shadows, carboxes, params, textures

item.title: New Release: Persona 5 Morgana Van
item.description: Ridiculous car originally from Persona 5- help on parameters by Flawestruck

item.title: Update: Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: Switched horn and engine sounds- added carbox

item.title: New Release: Carbox 2 & 3
item.description: Slightly improved version of Skarma's?? Carbox- green-screen version also included

item.title: Update: Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: Re-converted mesh due to oversight, added new horn and engine sounds

item.title: New Release: Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: New Ryuji car conversion from NFS4- using TheMeandMe's Murciélago as a base

item.title: Update: Toyota bB (was Scion xB)
item.description: Renamed for accuracy to original model- mesh was re-converted and repaired!

item.title: Update: Blitz ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new hull generated

item.title: Update: Tommy Kaira ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new hull generated, utilizes ZZII Pro parameters
